allow: Bash(timeout 10 sh -c 'pnpm run dev & pid=$!; sleep 3; curl -s http://localhost:3000/papers > /dev/null; curl -s http://localhost:3000/news > /dev/null; curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/apple -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"identityToken\\":\\"fake\\"}" > /dev/null; sleep 2; kill $pid')
